name_en: 🆕 Upgraded Version⚠️ M14194 Black & Color! Collaboration Takashi Murakami! Nano Diane Baguette. The Nano Diane in Monogram Empreinte leather is a miniaturized version of the iconic Diane bag. This meticulously crafted piece features all key details of the original design, including a round flap, piped edges, and strap-style magnetic closure. Its removable handle and detachable adjustable shoulder strap offer different carrying options.
name_cn:
🆕 Upgraded Version⚠️ M14194 Black & Color! Collaboration Takashi Murakami! Nano Diane Baguette. The Nano Diane in Monogram Empreinte leather is a miniaturized version of the iconic Diane bag. Size: 19 x 10.5 x 6cm.
